privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how the «MarO» pastry studio collects, uses, and protects your personal information when using our website.

blocks.p: Since our site works as a showcase and does not process online payments, we collect a minimal amount of data: contact and technical data.
To process your order and contact you for its confirmation and delivery. To improve the user experience.
We do not sell or transfer your personal data to third parties. Data is transferred directly via the Telegram API exclusively for order processing.
